mapper.select:
SELECT t.id,t.user_id,t.department_id,t.is_admin,t1.account,t1.id AS userId,t1.realname,t1.phone,t1.state, t1.sort,t1.create_time,
WM_CONCAT(DISTINCT t4.name || ',')
GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t4.name SEPARATOR ',')
AS roleNames FROM org_user_department t LEFT JOIN org_user t1 ON t1.id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN org_role t4 ON t4.id = t.role_id WHERE t.department_id IN
#{id}
and t1.is_deleted = 0 and t1.state != 9 GROUP BY t.id,t.user_id,t.department_id,t.is_admin,t1.account, t1.id,t1.realname,t1.phone,t1.state, t1.sort,t1.create_time ORDER BY t1.sort ASC, t1.create_time DESC

SELECT t.id,t.user_id,t.department_id,t.is_admin,t1.account,t1.id AS userId,t1.realname,t1.phone,t1.state, t1.sort,t1.create_time,
WM_CONCAT(DISTINCT t4.name || ',')
GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t4.name SEPARATOR ',')
AS roleNames FROM org_user_department t LEFT JOIN org_user t1 ON t1.id = t.user_id
LEFT JOIN org_role t4 ON t4.id = t.role_id WHERE t.department_id = #{id} and t1.is_deleted = 0 and t1.state != 9
AND ( t1.account LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR t1.realname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR t1.phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR t4.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') )
GROUP BY t.id,t.user_id,t.department_id,t.is_admin,t1.account, t1.id,t1.realname,t1.phone,t1.state, t1.sort,t1.create_time ORDER BY t1.sort ASC, t1.create_time DESC
